title: Nature and the Environment Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The usual weather in a place over a long time.
choices: climate
weather
temperature
rounds.answer: climate
rounds.explanation: climate: The usual weather in a place over a long time.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A very tall hill with steep sides.
choices: climate
weather
mountain
rounds.answer: mountain
rounds.explanation: mountain: A very tall hill with steep sides.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: To go and look at new places.
choices: weather
explore
climate
rounds.answer: explore
rounds.explanation: explore: To go and look at new places.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: What the sky and air are like today.
rounds.answer: weather

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A big area with many trees.
rounds.answer: forest

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Power that helps things move or work.
rounds.answer: energy

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: The desert has a hot, dry climate.
The temperature is 30 degrees today.
We saw white snow on top of the mountain.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: A big area with many trees.
The land next to the sea.
The land, water, animals, and plants around us.
To go and look at new places.
rounds.answer: A big area with many trees.
rounds.explanation: The deer ran through the green forest.

choices: Land with sand near the sea.
Power that helps things move or work.
The land, water, animals, and plants around us.
To go and look at new places.
rounds.answer: Land with sand near the sea.
rounds.explanation: I built sandcastles on the beach.

choices: Power that helps things move or work.
The land next to the sea.
To go and look at new places.
What everything is made of; it takes up space.
rounds.answer: The land next to the sea.
rounds.explanation: Fishermen live in a village near the coast.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1 — Describe a Place in Nature

rounds.target: Have you ever explored a ______ (forest / beach / mountain)?
Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: I built sandcastles on the beach.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: We will explore the forest path tomorrow.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Water, rock, and air are all types of matter.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'forest' mean in this unit?
choices: A big area with many trees.
The usual weather in a place over a long time.
What the sky and air are like today.
rounds.answer: A big area with many trees.
rounds.explanation: forest: A big area with many trees.

rounds.prompt: What does 'energy' mean in this unit?
choices: The usual weather in a place over a long time.
What the sky and air are like today.
Power that helps things move or work.
rounds.answer: Power that helps things move or work.
rounds.explanation: energy: Power that helps things move or work.

rounds.prompt: What does 'weather' mean in this unit?
choices: How hot or cold something is.
What the sky and air are like today.
The usual weather in a place over a long time.
rounds.answer: What the sky and air are like today.
rounds.explanation: weather: What the sky and air are like today.
